prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4G63T (7th-gen block, 85mm bore, forged internals)** with a **Garrett GT35R turbo (0.82 A/R, 67mm compressor wheel)** and **HKS 272°/272° camshafts** for 450whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** managing **ID1000 injectors** and a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate**
Full **Tommy Kaira Racing** 6-speed manual transmission conversion with **PPG close-ratio gears (2.345 1st, 1.752 2nd)** and a **Nismo 2-way LSD** for aggressive power delivery
Custom **GReddy intercooler core (600x300x76mm, bar-and-plate design)** with **Mishimoto silicone couplers** and a **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve** to eliminate heat soak under repeated boost cycles
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Galant VR-4 specific, 30mm extended fenders)** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** and **Volk Racing TE37SL 18x9.5 +15** wheels in **Gunmetal with gold hardware**
**Tommy Kaira M20 front bumper lip** (OEM+ style) paired with a **Veilside Fortune rear diffuser** and **custom 3-inch dual exhaust tips (stainless steel, rolled edges)**

**Recaro SP-G (Kai-style) seats** in **black Alcantara with red stitching**, **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel**, and **custom AMG-style gauge cluster (Defi Advance BF series, 300kPa boost, 100°C EGT, 12V voltmeter)**
